name: G2→G3 Zone 4 — The Broken Blade Spur Wandering Monsters
description: Wandering monster table for Zone 4 (Days 7–8): Inside the fire giant kingdom's outer territory. Heat is constant. Patrols are real. Stealth is survival. Check frequency: once per 8 hours of travel, once per 8 hours of rest.

results.text: 1d4 Fire Giants (armed patrol; torches unnecessary in the ambient heat) [PF2e Lvl 10 each]
3d6 Hell Hounds (loose pack, territorial) [PF2e Lvl 5 each]
1d4 Firedrakes (nesting near the lava flows) [PF2e Lvl 5 each]
1 Fire Giant Sub-Chief + 2 Fire Giants (commanding officer inspection) [PF2e Lvl 12 / Lvl 10]
2d6 Salamanders (gathering ore near a vent; not hostile unless attacked) [PF2e Lvl 5 each]
1d3 Young Red Dragons (fire giant auxiliaries; aggressive by nature) [PF2e Lvl 10 each]
2d8 Orcs + 2 Ogres (work crew clearing a lava obstruction from the road) [PF2e Lvl 1 / Lvl 3]
1 Fire Giant + 2d6 Hell Hounds on chains (handler patrol) [PF2e Lvl 10 / Lvl 5]
2d4 Firenewts mounted on Giant Striders (cavalry scouts) [PF2e Lvl 4 each]
1d4 Efreeti (envoys from the City of Brass; visiting King Snurre on business) [PF2e Lvl 12 each]
3 Fire Giants (off-duty; arguing; notice the party on a DC 20 Stealth failure) [PF2e Lvl 10 each]
1 Fire Giant Champion (King Snurre's personal guard, running a perimeter inspection) [PF2e Lvl 14]
HAZARD — Minor volcanic eruption: ash cloud reduces visibility to 20 feet for 1d8 hours; DC 18 Fortitude or dazzled; fire magic used nearby triggers a patrol alarm
HAZARD — Fresh lava flow crossing the route; DC 22 Athletics to leap across or find a bypass (2 hours lost; DC 24 Stealth to bypass without a patrol check)
BOSS — King Snurre's Champion: a legendary fire giant fighter patrolling the outer perimeter; if combat, a signal horn sounds on his second round
